title: No ad-hoc agent invocation path — every use requires a .workflow.yaml spec
body: pi-subagents allows /run scout 'analyze auth' with zero files written. Our system requires a .workflow.yaml for every agent invocation. This makes the barrier to use much higher for exploration, debugging, and one-off tasks. A /workflow run-agent <name> command or equivalent tool call that dispatches a single agent step with inline input (JSON or key=value) would bridge this gap. The agent's input schema (once enforced) provides validation; the task template provides prompt rendering; the output schema provides structured results — all without a workflow spec.
